name: ripple-mcp
description: Codebase intelligence MCP server. Indexes source code into a graph + vector store, then exposes retrieval, blast-radius analysis, co-change prediction, criticality scoring, and AI guardrails as MCP tools for IDE-embedded LLMs.

remotes.description: Public demo endpoint (Juspay fintech codebase, 148K symbols)

tools.name: search_symbols
tools.description: Semantic + keyword search for functions, types, and modules across indexed codebases

tools.name: search_modules
tools.description: Search for module namespaces by concept or keyword

tools.name: get_module
tools.description: List all symbols in a module with summaries

tools.name: get_function_body
tools.description: Fetch source code of a function by fully-qualified ID

tools.name: trace_callers
tools.description: Find all functions that call a given function (upstream impact)

tools.name: trace_callees
tools.description: List all functions called by a given function (downstream deps)

tools.name: get_blast_radius
tools.description: Import graph + co-change history for changed files. Includes cross-service Granger causal predictions.

tools.name: predict_missing_changes
tools.description: PR review: detect files likely missing from a changeset using Granger causality

tools.name: check_my_changes
tools.description: SDLC guardian: blast_radius + missing changes + risk score + security scan + reviewers in one call

tools.name: suggest_reviewers
tools.description: Module ownership from git history — who should review changes to these files?

tools.name: score_change_risk
tools.description: Composite risk score (0-100) from blast radius, coverage gap, reviewer concentration, service spread

tools.name: check_criticality
tools.description: Criticality score + signals (blast radius, co-change coupling, bus factor, churn) for any module

tools.name: get_guardrails
tools.description: AI-generated guardrail doc for critical modules: invariants, what breaks, who must review

tools.name: list_critical_modules
tools.description: Ranked critical modules for a service above a criticality threshold

tools.name: fast_search
tools.description: Zero-GPU BM25 keyword search, <50ms. Best for identifier/name lookups.

tools.name: fast_search_reranked
tools.description: BM25 top-30 with cross-encoder reranking. P@10=0.900, p95=84ms.

tools.name: search_requirements
tools.description: Search for functional requirement clusters matching behavioral/flow questions (How does X work?)

tools.name: get_why_context
tools.description: WHY context: ownership, activity trend, Granger causal direction, anti-pattern flags

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Full semantic context for a query (5k-18k tokens). Last resort after targeted tools.
